CONDITIONAL NON-OPPOSITION TO PLTF'S MO FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL (TRANSACTION ID # 27847393) FILED BY DEFENDANT N&A ENTERPRISES, INC., DBA BIG D FLOOR COVERING SUPPLIES

ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-10-2009 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) & (D). THE COURT ADOPTS THE SAME ORDER AS THE FRANCES FITCH CASE (# 274373), ALL DEADLINES BEING THE SAME AS REFLECTED ON CASE NO. 274373. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 2/1/2010 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206. THE STATUS AND SETTING CONFERENCE OF 2/18/2010 IS VACATED. PLAINTIFF TO CONTACT DEPT. 502 FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE DATES. ALL DISCOVERY MOTIONS WILL BE HEARD IN DEPT. 206. DISCOVERY IS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL COURT. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION, CASE NO. 275348 AND CASE NO. 274373 ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL. THE LEAD CASE IS #274373 (FRANCES FITCH) WHICH IS THE WRONGFUL DEATH ACTION. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE ALL DEFENDANTS ON BOTH ACTIONS WITH ALL DISCOVERY RESPONSES. DEFENDANTS TO SERVE ALL DISCOVERY RESPONSES IN BOTH ACTIONS. BERRY AND BERRY IS TO PREPARE A LIST OF DEPOSTIONS TAKEN ON BOTH ACTIONS AND SERVE ON EVERYBODY SO TRANSCRIPTS CAN BE OBTAINED TO DETERMINE WHETHER OR NOT THERE NEED TO BE A RE-OPENING OF THE DEPOSITION AS REFLECTED ON THE REPORTER'S NOTES. ORDER SIGNED ON PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE. PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER ON THE CONSOLIDATION OF THE TWO CASES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: HELEN SOREP-MATLEY, CSR # 9225 (206)
